meaning: Tactical Air Control,战术空军控制;Technical Assistance Center,技术支持中心
examples: As soon as the water started to boil-- "tac"!
The second ticket was a tic-tac-toe game.

For the basis of the vehicle, the company has turned to Brazilian auto manufacturer TAC Motors.
